# Glowing Embers of Faith
## Scripture
"But you, dear friends, must build each other up in your most holy faith, pray in the power of the Holy Spirit, and await the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ, who will bring you eternal life." - Jude 1:20-21

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're reminded of the fleeting nature of comets, brief visitors to our celestial neighborhood. Their glowing trails, however, can persist for a while, a testament to the brief yet profound impact they've had on our sky. In a similar way, our lives on earth are short, but the embers of our faith can glow long after we're gone, warming and inspiring those around us. As we navigate life's journey, we're called to tend to these embers, fanning them into flames through prayer, community, and obedience to God's Word.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, thank you for the brief, shining moments of life you've given us. Help us to tend to the embers of our faith, that they may glow brightly for all to see. May our lives be a testament to your love and mercy, and may we leave a lasting impact on those around us. As we await the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ, give us the courage to build each other up in our most holy faith, and to pray in the power of the Holy Spirit. Amen.
